anchor.story_pitch: Kuro, a cyber-monk, must protect the last digital seedling from the Extroma hivemind.

world_rules.content: Digital seedlings cannot survive without a tethered organic host.

cast.name: Kuro
cast.motivation: Reach the Safe Zone before the battery dies.

cast.name: Mike
cast.motivation: Steal the seedling for the Syndicate.

timeline_facts: Kuro escaped the Sector 6 ambush at 04:00.
Mike provided a map that led Kuro through the tunnels.

unresolved_loops.description: Who sent the signal that compromised the Sector 6 base?

milestone_summaries: Chapters 1-3: The fall of the Neo-Monastery and the initial flight with the seedling.

recent_changes: Kuro's cyber-arm took a direct hit from a pulse rifle.
Mike stole an encrypted keycard while Kuro was resting.
